creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Thanks for the submission. Please note you do not have to attach build logs. A confirmation that build tests have passed (and which) suffices.

And please help us track the issue by setting the maintainer-approval(+) flag on attachments for ports you're maintainer of (under attachment Details).

Also please list the changes in versions so we can consider the changes for MFH.
